hotel_name: Khách sạn Tokyo Phan Rang (Tokyo Hotel Phan Rang)

reviews.title: The lobby smells bad, the amenities are cheap, and the breakfast is awful!
reviews.text:
The reception area has a smell (seems like the smell of sewage). 
The mattress is hard / the breakfast is very bad! 
However, it is rated 4 stars and charges extra for children but does not provide extra pillows, toothbrushes, or towels. 
Disappointed with the service here.

reviews.title: Say the truth
reviews.text: The listing mentioned a balcony and a bathtub, but after settling the bill, the bathtub was missing, and when checked into the room, there was no balcony at all. When asking the receptionist if they had mixed up the rooms, the receptionist insisted that there was no mistake. The breakfast was also poor, and the fruit wasn't very fresh; being in a land known for grapes, the grapes were actually wilted. The room rental price was also a bit steep.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
The bed was amazingly hard (no ironie); Want such a mattress for my personal home!
Breakfast is very good quality.
Everything was up to standard and very clean.
The restaurant on the ground floor makes very tasty meals (in case you need something to eat in the afternoon or evening and the location is very pleasing.
reviews.negatives:
The noise isolation could be better.
I woke up from people walking on the emergency stairs, as my room had an outside wall towards the site where the emergency stairs are located.

reviews.title: Expecting few years later
reviews.text: The room having a nice view of mountains in the distance  and a pleasant breeze from window with the soup of hammers at the construction site. It’ might be coming back after construction over.

reviews.title: if your looking for a very clean hotel close to beach with lovely restaurant four seasons on the beach this would be ide
reviews.positives: the staff were very helpful and let me check in early and even upgraded me too which was very kind, hotel is very clean and lovely rooftop dining area

reviews.title: Beautiful hotel
reviews.text: Breakfast food is not very diverse.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Le personnel très chaleureux et efficace. Propreté, petit déjeuner délicieux

reviews.title: Motorcycle traveler
reviews.text: The staff were very friendly, and the security guard in the parking lot was also kind. However, the room was too small, and even though breakfast was included, it was just one bowl of noodles. The coffee I ordered separately during breakfast had to be paid for separately. I requested laundry service, but the prices were ridiculously high. I don't want to recommend it that much.

reviews.title: Personnel de l'accueil de grande qualité.
reviews.positives: La serviabilité et la gentillesse du personnel.
reviews.negatives: La qualité des scooters proposés à la location pourrait être améliorée.

reviews.title: Good for budget travel
reviews.text: I stayed only 1 night, so for that price, the hotel is good. Clean and comfortable.

reviews.title: Superbe en tout point
reviews.positives:
Tout le personnel que ce soit à la réception au restaurant et même stationnement sont vraiment super professionnel.
Petit déjeuner excellent. j'y retournerai.

reviews.title: New and affordable hotel
reviews.text: As summer arrives, the hotel does not have a pool or private beach, but the rooms are clean and new. It's quite convenient as the beach is just a 200m walk away.

reviews.title: Für europäische Touristen schwierig
reviews.negatives:
Personal kann kein Englisch, Verständigung unmöglich 
Frühstück war so gut wie nicht vorhanden

reviews.title: Overpriced for small room in small town
reviews.text: The hotel and room are much smaller than in the pictures.  The price is too high during the off-season in a small town.   We don't see many other guests.  The staff was very helpful and polite.

reviews.title: Für einen Zwischenstop gut geeignet.
reviews.positives:
Sehr schönes Hotel.  Sehr sauber. Zimmer sind nicht besonders groß, aber ausreichend.  Genügend Stauraum. Kaffee und Teezubereitung im Zimmer möglich.
Frühstück gibt es auf der Dachterrasse.  Man kann auch im Hotel eine Kleinigkeit zu essen bekommen.  Wichtig, da es in der direkten Umgebung nichts gibt. 
Der Strand ist ein paar Minuten zu Fuß entfernt.  Das Hotel bietet einen kostenlosen Shuttlebus an. Am Wochenende ist der Strand voll und es gibt dann auch Essenstände. In der Woche hatten wir 5 km Strand für uns alleine. Es gibt ein kleines Restaurant am Strand.  Relativ teuer aber gut.
Man kann in die Stadt laufen. Grab ist auf jeden Fall besser. 
Es gibt riesige Parkanlagen und sehr breite Straßen. 
Die Menschen sind alle sehr nett.
Das Meer ist angenehm warm und flach.
reviews.negatives:
Rings um das Hotel gibt es nichts. Leere Hotelanlagen, noch nicht eröffnete Geschäfte und einfach Brachflächen. Hier wird viel gebaut. 
Leider am Wochenende viel Müll am Strand und im Wasser. In der Woche war es viel besser.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Room not very large. Choice for breakfast. Many hotels around but not so many restaurants

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Dass die Türen nur die halbe Nacht gepiept haben.
reviews.negatives: Ein vegetarisches Frühstücksangebot fehlt leider völlig.

reviews.title: It's okay.
reviews.text: The family had the chance to visit Ninh Thuan, and the accommodations in this area are decent and clean!

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Kamer is goed maar bedden zijn erg hard
reviews.negatives:
Personeel sprak nauwelijks Engels.
De omgeving is kaal en leeg, niets te doen in de buurt behalve een strand zonder faciliteiten

reviews.title: Not as expected
reviews.text:
Hotel pictures much different than in reality. A very local hotel. 
No face towels, bathroom door cannot stay open, no outlet in bathroom, sheets are stained.  Breakfast food is average at most and small selection.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.negatives: Qui định ăn sáng từ 06 --> 09h, gia đình tôi đến lúc 08h, đa số món ăn đã hết, nhưng không thấy thêm vào, chủ yếu còn trứng ốp la và bún cá. Đây là điểm tôi thấy khách sạn cần cải thiện, còn lại mọi thứ đều rất tốt.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text:
- The first impressive point is the enthusiastic, attentive, and caring staff.
- The hotel is located near the beach, with free shuttle service from 4 PM to 6 PM.
- The breakfast is not very diverse, but the quality is decent. The coffee is good.
- The room is quite small compared to the average size of hotels in Vietnam.
- The room is simply decorated and clean.

reviews.title: Lần đầu du lịch tại TP Phan Rang với nhiều khám phá và trải nghiệm sự mộc mạc và hoang sơ của xứ biển
reviews.positives: Khách sạn sạch sẽ, buffer phục vụ chu đáo

reviews.title: Everything is just...okay
reviews.text: After careful consideration of various resorts and hotels in Phan Rang for a two-night business trip, I decided to stay at the TOKYO Hotel. While I was slightly disappointed by the absence of a swimming pool and a more elaborate restaurant, I found the room to be satisfactory.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Chỗ nghỉ có xe điện đưa đón ra bãi biển.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Clean room, friendly staff, decent breakfast. However, the room rate is high compared to the quality of the room.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Sạch sẽ tiện nghi gần biển, phục vụ tốt vui vẻ dễ thương

reviews.title: A great hotel in a weird location
reviews.text:
It's not a bad location, it's just that it stands alone in the middle of a block!

Other than that a perfectly nice hotel

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Oseblje hotela je zelo prijetno in vedno na raspolago da pomaga za vsako zadevo. Delavec na parkingu hotela si je prislužil eno veliko Gorenjkino čokolado z lešniki ker naš motor je dal v posebni garažni prostor v hotelu kje se nahaja samo njihovo slućbeno vozilo. Vse naj naj

reviews.title: New hotel
reviews.text: Decent stay at a fairly new hotel

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.negatives: Breakfast was very poorly prepared. And there was too little.

reviews.title: Nhân viên lấp liếm, thiếu chuyên nghiệp
reviews.text:
Tôi đã đặt phòng Sea view junior suite với mong muốn được ngắm nhìn khung cảnh biển. Tuy nhiên, khi nhận phòng, tôi lại nhận được phòng hướng thành phố.

Tôi đã liên hệ với nhân viên lễ tân để phản hồi về vấn đề này và chỉ mong nhận được một lời giải thích hợp lý. Tuy nhiên, câu trả lời mà tôi nhận được khiến tôi vô cùng thất vọng. Nhân viên lễ tân yêu cầu tôi ra ban công và nhìn ra ngoài để thấy biển.

Tôi đã làm theo hướng dẫn và ra ban công. Tuy nhiên, để có thể nhìn thấy biển, tôi phải nhướn cổ và ngó nghiêng rất khó khăn. Lý do là vì phòng của tôi nằm ở mặt bên hông của khách sạn, không trực diện hướng biển.

Với vị trí phòng như vậy, việc gọi đây là phòng "Sea view" là hoàn toàn không chính xác và gây hiểu lầm cho khách hàng. Cách trả lời của nhân viên lễ tân cũng thể hiện sự thiếu chuyên nghiệp và không tôn trọng khách hàng.

Thay vì thừa nhận sai sót và đề xuất giải pháp phù hợp, nhân viên lễ tân lại cố gắng lấp liếm bằng một câu trả lời đối trá.

Tôi hoàn toàn có thể chấp nhận nếu khách sạn thông báo rằng họ đã hết phòng hướng biển và xin lỗi vì sự bất tiện này. Tuy nhiên, cách xử lý thiếu thiện chí và thiếu tôn trọng của khách sạn đã khiến tôi vô cùng thất vọng và mất đi thiện cảm với nơi đây.

reviews.title: Very good for a few nights
Central location, new and modern.
reviews.text:
- Located right in the center of Phan Rang Thap Cham city. Can walk to the beach through Binh Son park.
- Convenient access to the center, the square area, Ninh Thuan Museum.
- Buffet restaurant on the 9th floor rooftop, with a nice view from various directions.
- Japanese-style name and concept. The restaurant serves a variety of dishes and drinks, including Japanese tea.
- Amenities are simply adequate, with cheerful and attentive staff.
- Rooms have beautiful window views, with high-quality, clean and beautiful bathroom interiors comparable to 5-star standards.
- There is street parking for cars along the road around the hotel, and empty lots that have not been constructed.

reviews.title: Recent Stay at Tokyo Hotel.
reviews.positives: Good security and the friendly staff at reception.  I also liked the rooftop breakfast area.
reviews.negatives: No gym to workout and world wide tv channels.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: The room is not clean yet. The mattress / pillow is still dirty and dusty.

reviews.title: EXCELLENT STAFF MAKE THIS HOTEL
reviews.text: 7 night stay, this hotel is located halfway between town centre & the beaches. Very quiet for my first 4 days,but then came to life during TET. Very clean & excellently maintained by a very hard working and pleasant staff. Will return to Tokyo on my next visit.

reviews.title: Good value for money.
reviews.positives: The hotel Tokyo is clean and a beautiful hotel ! The staff are very helpful.
reviews.negatives: The surroundings are a bit bleak but it’s not Hotel‘s fault. It’s the best hotel in the area.

reviews.title: Pleasant stay at Tokyo Hotel during quiet season!
reviews.text: We had a peaceful stay at the hotel, during early January, when the hotel was not too busy. The staff made us feel welcome and well attended to. It was very nice to be able to check in at any time in the night.  The breakfast was fairly simple but it was very nice to have on the hotel’s rooftop!  The room was very clean & generally felt quite luxurious. We felt the lunch options were a bit overpriced but it was okay

reviews.title: Lovel hotel would stay again
reviews.positives: Lovely Hotel with its own private free shuttle to the beach front about 300 meters away underground parking for motorbikes

reviews.title: New and very well run hotel.
reviews.text:
Tokyo Hotel is a newly built and attractively designed. The reception is exemplary with a very friendly and efficient household team.
All rooms are well ordered. I would say the deluxe rooms are worth notching up to for space. I think there are a one or two well proportioned suits available too.

reviews.title: Excellent Stay – Clean, Comfortable & Convenient Location
reviews.positives: Everything was excellent. The room was very clean and comfortable .All the staff were very friendly and helpful, which made our stay even more enjoyable. The breakfast was good with a nice variety of food

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: The newly built hotel is quite clean. It takes about 5 minutes to walk to the beach.

reviews.title: Great location and comfortable room.
reviews.positives: The hotel was clean and my room was comfortable and had a view of city and sea.  Nice easy walk to beach.

reviews.title: Nice little hotel
reviews.text: Small rooms but functional and sparkling clean. I would like to see  western breakfast options and reduced noise levels in the hallways (elevator chimes, music at 05:45 AM, door locks sounds) because sound insulation is poor.

reviews.title: Okay good.
reviews.text: Clean and beautiful apartment, good location, 10 minutes walking to the beach. Spacious parking lot. The staff's service attitude is cheerful and enthusiastic. The breakfast buffet doesn't offer many dishes but is well-prepared. I will come back.

reviews.title: Recommend
reviews.text: Will come back again. Japanese standards of hygiene and service. We really like it.

reviews.title: Very nice hotel
reviews.text: The most friendly staff and security guards I’ve ever encountered in Vietnam, seriously

reviews.title: It's okay to come in late at night.
reviews.text: It was good because it was a quiet place with a beach nearby, and it's not far to get to CT, making it an even better location. I would recommend this hotel to travelers. If you're going to Phang Nga, GO! GO! to this place!
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Twin with Old Port View

reviews.title: Nice and Clean Hotel
reviews.text: Room is spacious. Hotel is very well maintained and clean, yes, almost to Japanese standards and living up to its name as Tokyo Hotel. Sanitary wares in bathroom all fitted with Inax, the default Japanese brand next to Toto. My guess is maybe its owner is Japanese. Even has free satchets of Japanese green tea in the room

reviews.title: Nice hotel
reviews.text: We just stayed a short time at this hotel but the first impression was that the hotel is very clean, all facilities are sufficient, and the location is very convenient (near the beach and not far from the downtown) and not noisy. Strongly recommended for a short stay!

reviews.title: Clean and Quiet
reviews.text: Hotel is new, clean and quiet.  Staff is super friendly.

reviews.title: Very nice hotel close to the beach
reviews.text:
We really enjoyed our one night stay in this hotel.
Everything looks new and is spotless clean. 
The staff is very helpful and friendly.

The location is in walking distance to the beach. For restaurants you have to walk a little while to get to the centre.

The included buffet style breakfast is generous, but you find only Vietnamese breakfast options. For us this was fine, but as a Vegetarian the only option I really had was sticking to fried eggs with bread, which were quite good though.

Only thing we weren’t too keen about is the shower, which had too low water pressure.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: New, clean hotel. Enthusiastic staff.

reviews.title: Phan Rang Return
reviews.text: The staff here are always welcoming and very friendly, and the service is excellent. Thanks for a nice time here once again.

reviews.title: All good
reviews.text: For a 3 star hotel was really great! For me personally only the bed was very firm. Besides that all was excellent!  Good choice for breakfast, staff is very friendly and helpful. Free drive to the beach.

reviews.title: A hotel that left a good impression of Panlangxi.
reviews.text: The room is a bit small, but everything is great. The cleaning service is excellent, and they prepared breakfast with care. I also used the motorcycle rental service. One request is to remove the automatic lock on the bathroom door in the last photo. Doors that pull towards older women are very difficult. I really hope you can fix this.

reviews.title: ok
reviews.text: Wonderful! We arrived here on September 2nd and everything is fine. I give it a score of 9/10 and my girlfriend gives it 8/10.

reviews.title: The hotel is great, close to the beach.
reviews.text: The staff is enthusiastic, professional, and attentive to customers. The hotel is near the beach and close to a beautiful park.

reviews.title: Great Hotel, Fair Pricing
reviews.text: Entire staff including the guards outside are extremely nice. Relatively quiet, close to the beach and also just 5 minutes away from downtown. Will definitely book again when in the area.

reviews.title: Very satisfied
reviews.text: Great hotel, new interior, very clean rooms, fully equipped, beautiful view, staff is very enthusiastic, friendly, helpful, provides transportation to the beach, the atmosphere is very, very good.

reviews.title: Great accommodation here.
reviews.text: The accommodation is truly valuable with a convenient location, cleanliness, and friendly staff. The amenities are very good, including stable Wi-Fi and always available hot water. The breakfast is diverse and delicious, along with beautiful scenery which makes the experience even better. Spacious parking near the airport makes this an ideal place to relax and enjoy the local atmosphere.

reviews.title: Great experience

reviews.title: Worth the money
reviews.text: The new hotel is clean, well-equipped, and has a very cute electric vehicle to help transport guests to the beach. Our family is very satisfied staying here.

reviews.title: The hotel is very good!
reviews.text:

- The room has a window that faces the sea directly. You can see the sea and the park. Watching the sunrise from the room at 5 am is very beautiful.
- The hotel is located on a spacious street, with plenty of room for parking.
- The room is very clean and new.
- The staff is friendly and very helpful.

reviews.title: Khách sạn Tokyo
reviews.text:
Tôi ở thử lần đầu khách sạn này vì đọc Review thấy khen nhiều. Tuy nhiên tôi thấy không phù hợp với bản thân vì 1 số điều sau:
1. Cách âm kém, khách đi du lịch gia đình tới ở đông nên rất ồn ào.
2. Cửa nhà VS mở ra không tự giữ lại, do vậy mỗi lần đi mở ra mở vào rất bất tiện
3. Chăn ga gối nhiều mùi xà phòng hoá chất giặt tẩy.
4. Không có Bảng hướng dẫn khách sử dụng các kênh trên Tivi, phải tự dò tìm mất thời gian
5. Trên web nói có nhà hàng phục vụ ăn uống nhưng khi hỏi Lễ tân nói chỉ phục vụ các món đơn giản như mỳ xào, mỳ nước...
6. Đèn trong phòng chỉ có đèn ánh sáng trắng. Đèn bàn gần giường ngủ thì chập chờn như sắp cháy.

reviews.title: Great service in clean, fresh hotel
reviews.text: We stayed one night in this hotel and the rooms were very fresh and clean! The staff were very kind and helpful and arranged early check in, taxi ride to sight seeing, and even upgraded us to rooms with sea view! :)

reviews.title: Nice staff
reviews.text:
Very nice and accommodating staff. The area around the hotel is still in development, and therefore not many restaurants or such in walking distance. 
Clean and beautiful room, however the bed was very hard.
